evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-25 one more bounded official Maine DHHS/OFI pass across the public district-office stack, DHHS sitemap surfaces, and the live public county workbooks. The district office page still preserves office addresses and labels and now also proves office-to-office program referrals, while the public county workbooks are real official files, but neither surface binds counties or towns to DHHS/OFI office names, office identifiers, or service areas. Maine therefore still has official county counts, official office addresses, and cross-program office referrals without any public county-to-office assignment contract.
